swe_bench_verified.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-bench Verified task `pallets__flask-5014`: require a non-empty name for Blueprints. Things do not work correctly if a Blueprint is given an empty name. Raise a `ValueError` when `name` is empty. This v0.1 micro-benchmark checks only the focused regression in `src/flask/blueprints.py`.

swe_bench_verified.change_summary: Do not send session headers whose value is None.
swe_bench_verified.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-bench Verified task `psf__requests-1921`: removing a default header of a session should work when the header value is set to `None`. Update the session-setting merge logic so `None` values are filtered out before the merged mapping is returned. This v0.1 micro-benchmark checks only the targeted regression in `requests/sessions.py`.

swe_bench_verified.change_summary: Reject host labels that begin with a dot as invalid URLs.
swe_bench_verified.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-bench Verified task `psf__requests-5414`: requesting a URL like `http://.example.com` should raise `InvalidURL` instead of leaking a `UnicodeError`. Tighten invalid-host validation so leading dots are rejected. This v0.1 micro-benchmark checks only the targeted regression in `requests/models.py`.

swe_bench_verified.change_summary: Preserve proxy auth when reconstructing the netloc.
swe_bench_verified.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-bench Verified task `psf__requests-6028`: fix the proxy authentication regression by preserving auth information when reconstructing a URL netloc. This v0.1 micro-benchmark checks only the targeted regression in `requests/utils.py`.

swe_ci.change_summary: Automatically urlencode invalid query strings and keep UTF-8 quoting safe.
swe_ci.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-CI sampled micro-task `oauthlib__oauthlib__3bcbb2__bf0241`: automatic urlencoding of input. Update `oauthlib/common.py` so query strings with invalid raw characters are urlencoded instead of rejected, and keep UTF-8 quoting behavior correct. This local v0.1 benchmark checks only the focused regression in that file.

swe_ci.change_summary: Improve DebianControlLexer whitespace and package-list handling.
swe_ci.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-CI sampled micro-task `pygments__pygments__eeb568__35732f`: improve whitespace handling in `DebianControlLexer`. Update `pygments/lexers/installers.py` so field punctuation and whitespace are tokenized more precisely and package-list continuations are handled correctly. This local v0.1 benchmark checks only the focused lexer change in that file.

swe_ci.change_summary: Treat HTTP 201 as a successful token-exchange response.
swe_ci.task_prompt: Upstream SWE-CI sampled micro-task `modelcontextprotocol__python-sdk__281fd4__a9cc82`: accept HTTP 201 in the OAuth token exchange path. Update `src/mcp/client/auth/oauth2.py` so a 201 response is handled as success instead of raising an OAuth token error. This local v0.1 benchmark checks only that focused regression.

Upstream SWE-CI sampled micro-task `pydantic__pydantic-settings__e16290__0497ef`: make `InitSettingsSource` resolution deterministic. Update `pydantic_settings/sources/base.py` so alias selection preserves the first provided matching alias instead of consuming an arbitrary set element. This local v0.1 benchmark checks only the focused regression in that file.

must_contain: preferred_set_alias = next(alias for alias in alias_names if alias in init_kwarg_name)
